prose:
Frontier-orbital calculation on pyridine (11 atoms: N, C×5, H×5) at the DFT level using the B3LYP functional with the def2-TZVP basis set (tier 'standard'), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1 (closed-shell RKS), using PySCF via the chemkit frontier-orbitals skill. The calculation was a single point on the user-supplied geometry at /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz (no re-optimization at DFT level). SCF converged in 10 cycles. No warnings were reported; all integrity checks passed (trustworthy: true).

Key results:
  HOMO (index 20): −7.2525992 eV
  LUMO (index 21): −1.112786 eV
  HOMO–LUMO gap:    6.1398131 eV  ← headline value

Koopmans descriptors: vertical IP = 7.2525992 eV, vertical EA = 1.112786 eV, electronegativity = 4.1826926 eV, chemical hardness = 3.0699066 eV, softness = 0.32574281 eV⁻¹, electrophilicity index = 2.8494218 eV.

Total electronic energy: −248.3782 Hartree (−6758.7152 eV).

CLI: /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 pyridine.xyz --out live.json
